raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised text engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (safe-RL) and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.6": "The revised text improves a few problem paragraphs, but could benefit from more consistent register and attention to lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the empirical gap), but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with one drift (the forward reference placeholder).",
    "RX.4": "The revised text is harm-free, but with one minor regression (the apparent contradiction in the original text).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, except for the removed self-promotional claims."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised text engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (safe-RL) and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text improves a few problem paragraphs, but could benefit from more consistent register and attention to lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the empirical gap), but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with one drift (the forward reference placeholder).
rationale.RX.4: The revised text is harm-free, but with one minor regression (the apparent contradiction in the original text).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, except for the removed self-promotional claims.
